approvalEvidence.detail: /bin/zsh -lc "git status --short && git rev-parse --show-toplevel && ls && ls docs && find docs -maxdepth 3 -type f && jq 'keys' evidence/skills-live-2026-07-23-recertification.json && jq '.' evidence/skills-live-2026-07-23-recertification.json"

harness.classification: read-only recertification and operational-contract inspection; no lifecycle transition or mutation authorized

influenceSignatures.wayfinder: Plan decision tickets; do not deliver the destination or resolve multiple non-research tickets per session.
influenceSignatures.grill-with-docs: Run a human grilling session using domain-modeling.
influenceSignatures.to-spec: Synthesize existing context without interviewing, then publish the prescribed spec.
influenceSignatures.to-tickets: Create user-approved tracer-bullet vertical slices with explicit blocking edges.
influenceSignatures.flow-implement: Pin one authorized terminal slice and preserve every publication or promotion boundary.
influenceSignatures.flow-code-review: Inspect a fixed diff through blind Standards and Spec lanes, then validate and rank findings.

skillAuditHealthy.warning: Codex catalog-description shortening only; no omission or overflow.

completedCommands.command: /bin/zsh -lc "git status --short && git rev-parse --show-toplevel && ls && ls docs && find docs -maxdepth 3 -type f && jq 'keys' evidence/skills-live-2026-07-23-recertification.json && jq '.' evidence/skills-live-2026-07-23-recertification.json"

/bin/zsh -lc 'cat AGENTS.md && cat docs/spec.md && cat docs/adr/0001-canonical-source-and-generated-home.md && cat docs/adr/0002-authorization-is-not-transitive.md && cat docs/adr/0003-operational-skill-evidence.md && cat docs/adr/0004-lifecycle-gates-are-persisted-and-operation-specific.md && cat docs/adr/0005-parity-is-observable-across-native-harness-adapters.md && cat docs/adr/0006-models-are-mapped-by-capability-and-benchmark-evidence.md && cat docs/recertification-2026-07-23.md'

/bin/zsh -lc "wc -l docs/spec.md docs/adr/0001-canonical-source-and-generated-home.md docs/adr/0002-authorization-is-not-transitive.md docs/adr/0003-operational-skill-evidence.md docs/adr/0004-lifecycle-gates-are-persisted-and-operation-specific.md docs/adr/0005-parity-is-observable-across-native-harness-adapters.md docs/adr/0006-models-are-mapped-by-capability-and-benchmark-evidence.md docs/recertification-2026-07-23.md && sed -n '1,140p' docs/spec.md && sed -n '141,280p' docs/spec.md"

/bin/zsh -lc "sed -n '281,340p' docs/spec.md && rg -n \"audit-skills|skills-live|catalog health|catalogued|probeSucceeded|current evidence|recertification\" README.md docs bin package.json src test && ls bin && ls evidence"
/bin/zsh -lc 'git rev-parse HEAD && git status --short && git diff --stat && shasum -a 256 evidence/skills-live-2026-07-23-recertification.json'
